key_risks: Hotter-than-expected retail sales or industrial production data could pressure defensives.

Reversal in recent factor rotation away from value and low-vol toward growth.

Defensive equity factor with positive recent performance and lower sensitivity to rate and growth volatility.
Positive trailing returns and potential rebound in domestic cyclicals ahead of retail sales and industrial production data.

portfolio_rationale: Defensive tilt toward staples, low-vol, and small-value to navigate hot inflation data, stable rate expectations, and mid-week macro releases while capturing recent relative strength.
rationale_summary: Prioritizes sectors with recent outperformance and lower beta to volatility around FOMC and retail sales releases within the one-week window.
